name: Square woven Grid pillow purple/cream/rust - Threshold designed with Studio McGee
description:
Refresh the look of your space with this Square woven Grid pillow from Threshold designed with Studio McGee. This 18-inch square pillow showcases a woven grid pattern in purple, cream and dark brown hues, complemented by a solid purple reverse for an elegant look. Featuring a jacquard-fabric exterior and a well-filled interior, the throw pillow adds the right amount of comfort and style to your sofa, couch, bench or bed.

Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Looks like home, feels like you.
